ddls:
CREATE TABLE "annual_stats" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* The total number of starts (entries) in competitions */,
  "first_place" INTEGER /* The number of first-place finishes */,
  "second_place" INTEGER /* The number of second-place finishes */,
  "third_place" INTEGER /* The number of third-place finishes */,
  "earnings" TEXT /* Total earnings in the year */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the athlete in the year */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the athlete in the year */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Any injuries the athlete had during the year */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the athlete's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "athlete_id", "sport_id", "category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_stats_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES athletes ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the athlete belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Past injury history of the athlete */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the athlete (e.g., active, retired, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required for the sport */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age allowed for the sport */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment required for the sport */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Governing body or federation of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the category */,
  "gender_eligibility" TEXT /* Gender eligibility for the category (e.g., Male, Female, Mixed) */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: The year for which the statistics are recorded
